channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. SpaceX president Gwynne Shotwell floats Tesla merger on IPO day  qz.com

item.title: 17-year-old boy beaten into coma after Knicks Game 4 win outside Madison Square Garden, suspect sought by police - ABC7 Eyewitness News
item.description:
1. 17-year-old boy beaten into coma after Knicks Game 4 win outside Madison Square Garden, suspect sought by police  ABC7 Eyewitness News
  2. Police search for suspect who beat teen Knicks fan into a coma near MSG after Game 4  NBC New York
  3. NBA Finals: Knicks argument allegedly leads to 17-year-old getting beaten into coma after Game 4, NYPD seeks suspect  Yahoo Sports
  4. Suspect sought after 17-year-old boy beaten into coma near MSG after Knicks' Game 4 win: NYPD  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  5. Teen beaten into coma by brute bellowing ‘Spurs in 7’ during livestreamed Knicks Game 4 NYC brawl  New York Post

item.title: Exclusive: US military rushed to prepare ground mission to capture Iran’s uranium, but Trump paused it, sources say - CNN
item.description: Exclusive: US military rushed to prepare ground mission to capture Iran’s uranium, but Trump paused it, sources say  CNNSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News
